meaning: adj.<婉><谑>健壮的,肥胖的,魁伟的,一表人材的
examples: With a cry of delight he ran towards the slumbering Portly.
Who are the two noble portly figures accompanying her, now grown to man's estate?
"It seems that it was there he gave Portly his first swimming-lesson," continued the Rat.
Mr. Sharif, portly and famously fond of food, cultivates the image of being a typical Punjabi.
The portly actor-turned-politician eventually arrives, fresh from three other rallies elsewhere in the capital that evening.
